## Feature Description
Describe the feature you would like to propose in detail.

## Why is this needed?
Explain why this feature is important or useful.

## Proposed Solution
If applicable, describe your proposed solution or implementation idea.

## Additional Information
Add any other information that might help us understand your proposal better.
